= My AsciiDoc Document
:author: J. Gravelle
:version: 1.0

This is the document preamble. Attribute entries above are treated as
preamble content and do not form a separate section.

== Introduction

AsciiDoc uses leading '=' characters for headings, similar to Markdown's '#'.
One '=' is the document title (level 1), '==' is a section (level 2), and so on.

== Installation

Install via the package manager of your choice.

=== Prerequisites

Make sure you have Python 3.10 or later installed.

=== Quick Install

----
pip install mypackage
----

Note: the '----' above is a listing block delimiter, not a heading.

==== Verifying the Install

Run the following to confirm::

    mypackage --version
